prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约7031名，2023年前移至5866名，2024年回落至9316名（普通类），2025年物理类最低位次约9339名（再选不限组）。近两年位次在9300名 附近企稳，2025年基准约9339名；该校在四川省物理类（理科）招生计划：2022年93人、2023年86人、2024年85人、2025年71人、2026年75人。2026年较 2025年扩招4人（增幅约5.6%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列 第19名（Top20），属国内顶尖综合类师范大学，办学层次极高，对理科考生同样具有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排 名第37位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平；2022年曾出现江西投档线异常信号（低关注），但近年已恢复稳定；心理学A+、数学A、统计学A、地理学A+、 环境科学与工程A、生态学A、系统科学A-、物理学A-等理科相关学科实力突出，对理科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科 热门专业社会热度持续偏高，北师大在这些领域虽非传统强校，但依托985平台仍具竞争力；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约535,000人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约462,767人） 明显增长，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在9300名附近企稳、2026年计划小幅扩招（+4人）但四川省考生总数明显增加、北师大顶尖 办学层次对考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年基准9339名小幅后移；预测最低位次约9700名，区间9300–10100名。

- 数学与应用数学

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间9300–10100名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（励耘实验班、心理学等）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如低于9300名）可重 点冲击理科试验班和数学等优势学科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 7031, moving forward to 5866 in 2023, falling back to 9316 in 2024 (regular category), and in 2025, the lowest ranking for physics category was approximately 9339 (no re-selection group). In recent years, the ranking has stabilized around 9300, with a baseline of about 9339 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for physics category (science) in Sichuan Province: 93 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 85 in 2024, 71 in 2025, and 75 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 4 students (about 5.6% growth), which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 19th (Top 20), belonging to the top-tier comprehensive normal universities in China, with an extremely high level of schooling, which continues to attract science students; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal in Jiangxi's admission score line (low attention), but it has recovered and stabilized in recent years; disciplines related to science such as Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Ecology A, Systems Science A-, Physics A-, etc., are outstanding, strongly attracting science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have consistently high social popularity. Although BNU is not traditionally strong in these fields, it remains competitive due to its 985 platform; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 535,000, a significant increase compared to 2025 (about 462,767 for history and physics categories), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 9300, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+4 students) but a significant increase in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province, and the sustained attraction of BNU's top-tier schooling level, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 9339; the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 9700, with a range of 9300–10100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Psychology (including Psychology, Psychology Liyun Experimental Class)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Computer Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Statistics
- Artificial Intelligence
- Physics (including Physics, Astronomy)
- Chemistry
- Biological Sciences (including Biotechnology, Ecology, Biological Sciences)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- International Economics and Trade
- Financial Technology
- Education (including Education, Preschool Education, Special Education, Educational Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9300–10100, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Liyun Experimental Class, Psychology, etc.) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 9300), you can focus on applying for the Science Experimental Class and advantageous disciplines like Mathematics.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for liberal arts was approximately 1120; in 2023, it moved significantly forward to 690; in 2024, due to the inclusion of special-type majors such as Drama, Film and Television Literature, the minimum rank fell back to 1657 (approximately 321 for regular categories); in 2025, the minimum rank for history category is approximately 498. In recent two years, the rank has fluctuated around 500, with a baseline of approximately 498 for 2025. The enrollment plan for history category (liberal arts) in Sichuan Province: 50 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 35 in 2025, and 35 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 19th (Top 20), belonging to the top-tier comprehensive normal university in China, with an extremely high level of schooling and sustained attraction to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents (clarifying online rumors), with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. In 2022, there was an abnormal signal in Jiangxi's admission cutoff (low attention), but it has stabilized in recent years. It has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, Marxist Theory, A in Mathematics, and A in Statistics, etc., with strong disciplinary strength and strong attraction to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors shows a divergent wait-and-see trend, but as the top normal university, BNU has a significant brand effect. Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are supported by A-level disciplines at BNU, with stable application popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, a significant increase compared to 2025 (approximately 462,767 for history category + physics category), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings around 500, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province, and the sustained attraction of BNU's top-tier schooling level, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for the history category in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 baseline of 498. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 510, with a range of 480–530.
